title: [security] inconsistent Schnorr48 verification between Rust/C impls
description: Rust version (lichen-link/src/schnorr.rs:111-124) performs defense-in-depth: canonical bytes check for s, ZERO check, is_identity, is_torsion_free on pubkey. C version (lichen/subsys/lichen/link/schnorr48.c:426-432,443) only checks nonzero s (non-ct branch) and relies on monocypher recover_r. No equivalent pubkey validation. Violates "all impls MUST produce identical output for test vectors" and misses timing/DoS protections. Last touched in 39c26b888 (merge conflict cleanup in schnorr48.c). Affects MIC verification and link auth. See also link_ctx key handling and rx path in lichen_link_rx.c:139.
